overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an indoor transit plaza with neon advertisements, ascending a stairwell, and emerging onto a waterfront city street at dusk with palm trees and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit plaza with digital advertising screens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the indoor plaza toward the cyan-lit exit

notable_agents.action: person with red hair walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement panel on the left wall showing a character with a guitar
large rectangular digital display mounted on the ceiling showing video content
doorway at the far end framed with bright cyan neon lights indicating the stairwell entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit indoor transit plaza with polished concrete floors. Digital billboards line the left wall while overhead screens display advertisements. Sparse pedestrians are visible ahead as the character approaches a cyan-lit exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit stairwell with neon lighting and graffiti

events.description: enters the cyan-lit stairwell doorway from the indoor plaza
natural dusk light becomes visible at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the outdoor exit at the top

entered.detail: rectangular door frame illuminated with bright cyan neon strips and arrow indicators
wide concrete staircase ascending to street level with metal railings on sides
blue painted wall covered with colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character enters a stairwell marked by a prominent cyan neon frame and begins ascending the concrete steps. The walls are covered in graffiti, and a few pedestrians descend the stairs in the opposite direction. Natural light gradually increases as the character approaches the outdoor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and vehicle traffic

events.description: exits stairwell onto outdoor waterfront street with palm trees and buildings
approaching crosswalk and waiting as futuristic vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront sidewalk, navigating around pedestrians and approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the waterfront road

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the edge of the sidewalk against the evening sky
multi-story commercial building with glass facade and illuminated signage
zebra crossing with yellow stripes and red painted text on the asphalt
illuminated advertising display at a bus stop shelter

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell, the character steps onto a wide waterfront promenade at dusk. Palm trees line the left side while modern commercial buildings with neon signage rise on the right. The character walks along the concrete sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and approaching a crosswalk where futuristic vehicles drive by on the wet asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit indoor transit hub into the vibrant, open-air atmosphere of a waterfront city at dusk. It begins by following a character across polished concrete floors beneath the glow of digital billboards and overhead advertisements, moving steadily toward a cyan-lit exit. As the character passes through the doorway, the scene shifts into a graffiti-covered stairwell where the dim interior lighting gradually gives way to increasing natural light during the ascent. The camera then emerges from the stairwell onto a wide promenade, where the enclosed concrete walls expand into a vista of palm trees and towering commercial buildings adorned with neon signage. Finally, the movement continues along the sidewalk toward a crosswalk, where the environment settles into a twilight cityscape of wet asphalt and passing futuristic vehicles.
